mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns show no statistical significance against a zero-mean null.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market deterioration signals impending economic contraction, causing investors to discount equity valuations and producing negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of instances where UNRATE crosses 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power during expansionary phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and industrial production confirm broad-based demand expansion, driving corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform single-series baselines, or forward returns turn negative when both series rise concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Inflation spikes fail to predict negative 5-day returns, or the mechanism reverses direction during disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and economic resilience, supporting corporate profit margins and yielding positive forward equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rolling Rank IC remains below 0.01 over 5-year windows, or industrial output growth consistently precedes equity drawdowns.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in housing starts below 1.2 million units signals a collapse in residential construction demand, reducing capital expenditure forecasts and triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when housing starts fall below the threshold, or the signal shows no statistical edge in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market absorption, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive forward equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal produces negative forward returns, or the interaction term loses significance in multivariate regression tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly GDP growth revisions confirm macroeconomic momentum, prompting institutional portfolio rebalancing into equities and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: GDP revisions fail to predict 5-day forward returns, or the signal consistently underperforms during periods of stagflation.
